title: coleus excelsus
intro: Coleus excelsus, a tropical plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, is also known as Coleus aromaticus or Coleus officinalis. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as a natural remedy for digestive problems. The leaves of the Coleus excelsus plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a treatment.
